a:r.a:t: priority with evidence — no manual estimate
learning loop at every ticket close
manual RFC authoring for known patterns
L1 manually reads, triages, and routes every ticket. RCA written from scratch. Knowledge lost at close.
Recurring incidents reviewed weekly to create problem tickets. Investigation manual. Knowledge database rarely updated.
RFC manually authored post-fix. Risk estimated by experience. CAB prep is slow. Runbooks updated ad-hoc.
AI ingests, classifies, and scores every ticket instantly. RCA drafted automatically. KB updated at close.
AI proactively detects recurring patterns and auto-creates problem tickets. KB updated at every resolution.
AI generates RFC from incident resolution. Blast radius and risk auto-scored. CAB arrives pre-informed.
